content:
# Fluid Substitution

**Summary**: A method used to calculate the change in rock bulk modulus when pore fluids are changed.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016]] used fluid-substitution (Gassmann) to evaluate different reservoir conditions.

- [[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021]] performed fluid-substitution using Gassmann's equation to remove pore fluid effects before modeling.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021]] performed fluid-substitution using Gassmann's equation to remove pore fluid effects before modeling.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Used to predict how changes in fluid types affect P-wave and S-wave velocities. ([[2016-houssain|Houssain, 2016, p. 67]])

- Fluid substitution revealed a clear difference in velocity and density between gas/oil saturated zones and brine-saturated zones. ([[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021, p. 54]])
